# Topeng Lighting

> Architectural LED lighting manufacturer and project solution provider for Middle East facades, bridges, hotels, resorts, landscapes and public spaces.

## Core pages

- [Middle East project website](https://www.topenglighting.com/): Applications, lighting systems, project scenes, calculator and RFQ.
- [About Topeng Lighting](https://www.topenglighting.com/about.html): Company profile, capabilities, values, supported markets and project workflow.
- [Products](https://www.topenglighting.com/#products): Seven project-grade architectural LED lighting models.
- [Project consultation](https://www.topenglighting.com/#contact): Send drawings, BOQ and target visual effect.

## Product pages

- [YY-SWD-001 Linear Water Ripple Light](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/linear-water-ripple-light-yy-swd-001.html)
- [YY-XQD-3828 Slim Linear Wall Washer](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/slim-linear-wall-washer-yy-xqd-3828.html)
- [YY-XTD-2831 Ultra-Slim Linear Light](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/ultra-slim-linear-light-yy-xtd-2831.html)
- [YY-TGD-LP600 Modular High-Power Floodlight](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/modular-high-power-floodlight-yy-tgd-lp600.html)
- [YY-CDD-CB30 COB Landscape Spike Light](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/cob-landscape-spike-light-yy-cdd-cb30.html)
- [YY-DMD-R304 Stainless Inground Light](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/stainless-inground-light-yy-dmd-r304.html)
- [YY-SDD-S304 Stainless Underwater Light](https://www.topenglighting.com/products/stainless-underwater-light-yy-sdd-s304.html)

## Markets and languages

- Markets: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain and the wider Middle East.
- Languages: English and Arabic.
- Contact: tpchenzhilin@gmail.com / WhatsApp +86 173 0230 3755.
